ksa_text: Skill in measuring data and AI adoption and identifying adoption barriers, including usage analytics analysis, stakeholder feedback gathering, friction point diagnosis, and adoption strategy adjustment.

dcwf.top_element_label: Skill in conducting audits or reviews of technical systems.

ddat.top_element_label: Applying statistical and analytical tools and techniques

nice.top_element_label: Knowledge of vulnerability assessment tools and techniques

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: AI risks based on assessments and other analytical output from the MAP and MEASURE functions are prioritized, responded to, and managed.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-S-003 (OP, Skill) does not clear the moderate fit inclusion threshold of 0.43. Composite score 0.4158 is insufficient to establish relevance to financial risk analytics, quantitative risk modeling, and data-driven risk assessment at IC-to-senior-IC level. Framework signals (ddat=0.416, nice=0.403, dcwf=0.396) do not demonstrate sufficient alignment with core analytics/BI work.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: OP domain KSA OP-S-003 excluded at composite 0.4158, but KSA text contains direct analytics-domain signals. Internal consistency: the presence of analytics terminology in a moderate fit KSA at score 0.4158 suggests the threshold is excluding genuinely relevant content.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.rebuttal: Composite 0.4158 with confirmed analytics-domain terminology for a OP (moderate fit) KSA indicates real role relevance for Financial Risk Specialist. The 0.43 threshold is a calibration heuristic; text-signal confirmation overrides marginal score shortfall at this level.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 exclude overturned. OP KSA with composite 0.4158 and confirmed analytics-domain text signals included on internal consistency grounds.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA OP-S-003 (OP, composite 0.4158) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: KSA content aligns with DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles. Analytics-domain terminology in KSA text confirms practical relevance to IC ANL work. Composite 0.4158 with signal across ddat=0.416, nice=0.403, dcwf=0.396 is consistent with documented ANL competency expectations at IC-to-senior-IC level. External ground truth supports inclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include upheld. External evidence from OP-domain frameworks confirms KSA relevance to Financial Risk Specialist at IC-to-senior-IC level.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P3 internal consistency. Final decision: include. Composite 0.4158, domain OP. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
